ddls:
CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene ontology term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of the term (e.g., MF, BP, CC) */,
  "go_term" TEXT /* GO term code (e.g., GO:0003674) */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name of the GO term */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the GO term */,
  "is_obsolete" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the term is obsolete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated GO term */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the evidence is derived */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species the annotation is associated with */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific gene */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who curated the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Numeric score indicating the confidence level of the annotation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_evidence FOREIGN KEY ("evidence") REFERENCES evidences ("evidence_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidences" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence type */,
  "evidence_name" TEXT /* Name of the evidence type (e.g., IEA, EXP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the evidence type entails */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the evidence type */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the evidence type is recommended */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example of how the evidence type is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Interproscan, Extended) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source and its relevance */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., database, publication) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the source */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the source is trusted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, curator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* NCBI taxon ID for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species the gene belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
